# Chase Sapphire Preferred

## 💰 Fees

- Annual fee: $95
- Foreign transaction fee: none
- Authorized user fee: $0
- Balance transfer fee: 5% (min $5)
- Cash advance fee: 5% (min $10)

## 🎁 Welcome Offer

- Example public offer with spend requirement over 3 months
- Status: confirmed

## 📈 Earning Rates

1. Dining — 3x
2. Streaming — 3x
3. Online grocery — 3x
4. Travel — 5x on Chase Travel, 2x other
5. All other — 1x

## 🔄 Redemption

- Program: Ultimate Rewards
- Transfer partners: 14
- Points worth 25% more through Chase Travel portal
- Cash out at 1 cpp

## 🏷️ Credits

1. $50 annual hotel credit — book through Chase Travel, resets each account year

## ✈️ Travel Benefits

- No lounge access
- Primary rental car CDW (outside home country)
- Trip cancellation/interruption insurance
- Baggage delay insurance
- Trip delay reimbursement

## 🛡️ Protections

- Purchase protection (120 days)
- Extended warranty (+1 year)
- No return protection

## ⚙️ Account Mechanics

- Virtual card numbers via Chase app
- $0 authorized user fee
- Auto-pay and alerts available

## ✅ Eligibility

- Subject to Chase 5/24 rule
- Not available if you hold or recently held a Sapphire card and received a bonus in the last 48 months

## 🧭 Strategy

- Downgrade to Chase Freedom Unlimited or Freedom Flex to keep points alive
- Pairs well with other Ultimate Rewards cards for combined earning
- Keeper value depends on dining/travel spend exceeding $95 annual fee

## 📋 Confidence Notes

- Fixture only. Not live card data.
